systemStatus.headline: Sat Jul 18, 4 AM run. Toast advanced to Thu Jul 16: net $6,069.60, +7.2% vs same day last week, labor 21.1%. Sling carries Fri Jul 17 (13 staff / 60.16 hrs) -- Sat Jul 18 lands ~7 AM. REVIEWS LIVE-SCRAPED both listings: The Brewhouse 4.5/517 with ONE unreplied (Thuy Anh Le, 5-star photo-only); Brewhouse Coffee 5.0/2 with ZERO unreplied. Prior backlog was overstated -- corrected. Malformed 24-hr Sling shifts persist (Isael/Cook, Casey/GM). WORLD CUP FINAL TOMORROW (Sun Jul 19).
systemStatus.detail:
Sat Jul 18 04:10 AM PT run.

TOAST (Thu Jul 16, location-level, most recent available -- Fri Jul 17 email lands ~7:40 AM): net $6,069.60 / gross $6,250.45 / 245 guests / 147 orders / 158 checks / avg guest $24.77 / labor $1,279.73 = 21.1% of net. Discounts $180.85 (3.0%), voids $105.00 (1.7% of net vs $62 SDLW), refunds $0. vs SDLW Thu Jul 9: net +7.2%, gross +7.7%, guests +6.1%, orders +8.9%. Growth is traffic-driven; avg per order slipped $0.64.

SLING (Fri Jul 17, most recent -- Sat Jul 18 not in until ~7 AM): 13 staff / 14 shifts / 60.16 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT. Malformed 24-hr shifts: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:34A-4:34A, Casey Smith (GM) 6:02A-6:02A.

REVIEWS -- LIVE SCRAPE, BOTH LISTINGS CONFIRMED. The Brewhouse: 4.5 stars, 517 reviews, 1 unreplied (Thuy Anh Le 5-star, photo-only, Jul 17). Brewhouse Coffee: 5.0 stars, 2 reviews, 0 unreplied. Correction: Matthew Lourie, David Makosch, Fleur, Jay Roston are all answered; 'Matt Powers' is not on the Coffee listing. Draft reply prepared for Thuy Anh Le, NOT posted -- awaiting Joal approval.

GOOGLE ADS: 2 report-ready emails in 24h, 0 disapprovals, 0 budget alerts. No live scrape.

TRIPADVISOR: no ad report. YELP: 0 actionable inquiries.

EVENTS: World Cup Final Sun Jul 19 -- reservations building (Jason Price 6 + Ruju Patel 4, both 11 AM).
